title: magnolia × viridula
intro: Magnolia × viridula, also known as the Sweetbay magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Magnoliaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its leaves, which contain antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Magnolia × viridula include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
